parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.prompt }], temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 1024 } }}

={{ { title: '[ESTHEROIDS] ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.rule_description, group_id: 1, customer_id: 2, priority_id: $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.priority, state: 'new', article: { body: '

SOC Alert Briefing

' + $('Parse Response').item.json.summary + '

Severity: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.severity + '/15

Host: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.hostname + '

Source IP: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.source_ip + '

Destination IP: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.alertData.dest_ip + '

IOCs: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.iocs || []).join(', ') + '

Immediate Actions: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.immediate_actions || []).join(', ') + '

Assessment: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.severity_assessment || 'N/A') + '

', content_type: 'text/html' } } }}
